脗聽

脗聽脗聽Alessandra Moretti (S&D). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, una cosa 脙篓 certa: in Serbia non si pu脙虏 pi脙鹿 tornare indietro. Gli ultimi dieci mesi di protesta e di presa di coscienza da parte dei cittadini serbi, non solo studenti, hanno marcato una svolta profonda nella storia del paese, che non pu脙虏 essere ignorata n脙漏 dalla leadership serba, n脙漏 tantomeno dalle istituzioni europee.

Da qui e dalle richieste di migliaia di cittadini scesi in piazza serve ripartire, per costruire un paese nuovo.

Da parte dell'Unione europea e di questo Parlamento non si tratta di sostenere un candidato o un partito serbo, si tratta di sostenere i valori europei.

脙聢 ingenuo chi pensa che il Parlamento europeo possa appoggiare un governo che permette la repressione violenta delle manifestazioni, provvede a licenziare i dipendenti pubblici perch脙漏 partecipano alle proteste, imbavaglia la stampa, gioca sporco con il processo elettorale: per tutto questo non c'脙篓 posto nell'Unione europea.

Ci aspettiamo, invece, e vi assicuro lo speriamo davvero, di accogliere nella nostra famiglia europea una Serbia diversa, una Serbia democratica e libera.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Eugen Tomac (Renew). 芒聙聯 Doamn脛聝 pre脠聶edint脛聝, doamn脛聝 comisar, stima脠聸i colegi, poporul s脙垄rb este un popor cu voca脠聸ie european脛聝. Ceea ce 脙庐ns脛聝 nu 脙庐n脠聸eleg politicienii de la Belgrad este c脛聝 trebuie s脛聝 renun脠聸e. Este timpul s脛聝 renun脠聸e la discursul duplicitar prin care una spun 脠聶i cu totul alta fac atunci c脙垄nd discut脛聝 despre calea european脛聝 a Serbiei.

Este evident c脛聝 libertatea de exprimare, drepturile fundamentale trebuie garantate, iar practicile pe care actualul guvern le aplic脛聝 脙庐n rela脠聸ia cu propriii cet脛聝脠聸eni sunt condamnabile. Nu po脠聸i s脛聝 fii 脙庐n poz脛聝 cu Putin 脠聶i, 脙庐n acela脠聶i timp, s脛聝 脙庐i min脠聸i pe cet脛聝脠聸eni c脛聝 脙庐脠聸i dore脠聶ti integrare european脛聝. Nu se poate a脠聶a ceva 脙庐nt脙垄mpla ast脛聝zi. De aceea cred c脛聝 trebuie s脛聝 fim al脛聝turi de cet脛聝脠聸enii care 脙庐脠聶i doresc o Serbie european脛聝 al脛聝turi de noi.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Thomas Waitz (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, Madam脗聽Commissioner, I want to turn to the Serbian people. If you want a future for your children, and if you want to have a proper income, if you want to have functional institutions and good healthcare, if you want to have an independent justice system and serious and fair elections, please realise that you have to overcome your current authoritarian rulers. No matter if you want to join the European Union one day or not.

And I turn to us 芒聙聯 to our colleagues here, to the Commission and to the heads of states. Please stop your appeasement policy. It is harming the credibility of the European Union, it is harming our common values and it is harming the stability of the Western Balkan region. Let's come to reason. Let's support the opposition. Many people in Serbia have understood that their future lies in their hands. Let's openly support them. That is what I am advocating for.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Judita La脜隆脜隆脙隆kov脙隆 (NI). 芒聙聯 V脙隆脜戮en脙隆 pani predsedaj脙潞ca, v脙隆脜戮en脙颅 kolegovia, 脙潞脛聧as脜楼 ob脛聧anov na demokratick脙陆ch procesoch je d脙麓le脜戮it脙隆. Politick脙隆 anga脜戮ovanos脜楼 tie脜戮. Ka脜戮d脙漏 jedno zhroma脜戮denie demokraciu posil脜聢uje a diktat脙潞ru oslabuje.

Z脙隆rove脜聢 v脜隆ak plat脙颅, 脜戮e ochranu si zasl脙潞脜戮i iba zhroma脜戮denie, ktor脙漏 je vykon脙隆van脙漏 pokojne. Takto to definuje aj Eur脙鲁psky s脙潞d pre 脛戮udsk脙漏 pr脙隆va s脙颅dliaci tie脜戮 tu v 脜聽trasburgu. Lebo ak zhroma脜戮denie nie je pokojn脙漏, 脜隆t脙隆t je povinn脙陆 ochrany 脜戮ivota, zdravia a majetku ostatn脙陆ch, ktor脙颅 nie s脙潞 zapojen脙颅 do zhroma脜戮denia.

Vieme, 脛聧o sa dialo v Srbsku. Naozaj to vieme. A ak sme si ist脙颅, 脛聧o sa tam deje, 脛聧o chceme urobi脜楼? Postupuje sa tam nejako brut脙隆lne proti men脜隆in脙隆m, ako sme po脛聧uli napr脙颅klad od slovensk脙陆ch kolegov? Nech u脜戮 prijmeme ak脙漏ko脛戮vek rozhodnutie, d脙潞fam, 脜戮e to nechceme spravi脜楼 ako Putin. Pri ochrane men脜隆脙颅n 脜戮ij脙潞cich v Srbsku tam vtrhn脙潞脜楼 na tankoch, ke脛聫 u脜戮 tak stato脛聧ne zbroj脙颅me.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Tomislav Sokol (PPE). 芒聙聯 Po脜隆tovana predsjedavaju脛聡a, Srbija pod vla脜隆脛聡u Vu脛聧i脛聡a je autokratska dr脜戮ava. To je re脜戮im koji je preuzeo medije, ugu脜隆io slobodu izra脜戮avanja i pretvorio javnu sferu u instrument vlastite propagande.

Europska politika udovoljavanja Beogradu pokazala se potpunim proma脜隆ajem. Srbija godinama vodi politiku sjedenja na dvije stolice. Deklarativno te脜戮i 脛聧lanstvu u EU-u, a istodobno odr脜戮ava posebne odnose s Rusijom i provodi hegemonisti脛聧ki projekt 芒聙聻srpskog sveta芒聙聺.

Problemi Srbije dublji su, me脛聭utim, od Vu脛聧i脛聡a. Srpska pravoslavna crkva i velik dio intelektualne elite glavni su tvorci 脜隆iritelji velikosrpske ideologije. Najbolje se to vidi u Crnoj Gori u kojoj se poku脜隆ava uni脜隆titi crnogorski identitet i ponovno svesti ovu zemlju na privjesak Beograda.

Ako oporba u Srbiji doista 脜戮eli europsku podr脜隆ku, mora se jasno i nedvosmisleno ograditi od takve politike. Vidovdanski prosvjed pokazao je da je velikosrpska ideja itekako prisutna i u redovima oporbe, a to je ono 脜隆to Europa ne mo脜戮e prihvatiti.

Ovakvoj Srbiji nije mjesto u Europskoj uniji. Sve dok se Beograd kona脛聧no ne odrekne velikosrpske politike prema susjedima, vrata EU-a za Srbiju moraju ostati zatvorena.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Thijs Reuten (S&D). 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, colleagues, for years, the Commission allowed Vu脛聧i脛聡 to steadily undermine popular support for the EU. Instead, Vu脛聧i脛聡 publicly praises his real friends, Russia and China. For years, the EU has not held Vu脛聧i脛聡 to account. Instead, he became more autocratic, shrank the space for free media, civil society and fair elections. For years, all this disenfranchised supporters of a European Serbia and fed ethnonationalism again. For years, the Commission has not defended our values. Instead, we gave Vu脛聧i脛聡 public praise, hoping for him to choose the EU, hoping for stability 芒聙聯 but getting the opposite.

These failures now represent a serious challenge, and I am glad this House and Commissioner Kos understand that. But where are the Member States, the HR/VP or the President of the Commission? Your appeasement did not work. We need a strong, coordinated EU position, four-square behind those asking for transparency, democracy and fundamental rights, for Serbian citizens and for Europe.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Veronika Cifrov脙隆 Ostriho脜聢ov脙隆 (Renew). 芒聙聯 V脙隆脜戮en脙隆 pani predsedaj脙潞ca, v脙隆脜戮en脙隆 pani komis脙隆rka, v脙隆脜戮en脙颅 kolegovia, kolegyne, chcem podpori脜楼 a po脛聫akova脜楼 ka脜戮d脙漏mu, kto d脙麓razne a pokojne ods脙潞dil n脙隆silie vo脛聧i demon脜隆truj脙潞cim v Srbsku.

V auguste tohto roku sa s n脙隆silnou a neakceptovate脛戮nou reakciou stretla aj slovensk脙隆 men脜隆ina v B脙隆脛聧skom Petrovci a dnes chcem vysla脜楼 jasn脙陆 sign脙隆l mojim krajanom a krajank脙隆m na severe Srbska, ale aj v脜隆etk脙陆m ob脛聧anom Srbska: 脜隆tudenti a akt脙颅vni 脛戮udia nie s脙潞 a nikdy nesm脙潞 by脜楼 na脜隆脙颅m nepriate脛戮om.

Protesty nevypukli pre nejak脙陆 z脙隆stupn脙陆 probl脙漏m. Protesty s脙潞, preto脜戮e korupcia, nedbanlivos脜楼 a arogancia moci si tragicky vy脜戮iadali 脛戮udsk脙漏 脜戮ivoty.

Chcem, aby na脜隆i priatelia a krajania v Srbsku vedeli: vid脙颅me, 脛聧o sa deje, stoj脙颅me pri v脙隆s a podporujeme va脜隆e 脙潞silie o d脙麓stojnej脜隆脙颅 a slobodnej脜隆脙颅 脜戮ivot. Chceme sebavedom脙漏 Srbsko na eur脙鲁pskej ceste. Sebavedom脙漏 Srbsko ale nie je tak脙漏, ktor脙漏 ak脙陆mko脛戮vek sp脙麓sobom br脙隆ni svojim ob脛聧anom a ob脛聧iankam uplat脜聢ova脜楼 ich z脙隆kladn脙漏 pr脙隆va.

D脙隆my a p脙隆ni,脗聽podr脜戮avamo vas.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Gordan Bosanac (Verts/ALE). 芒聙聯 Po脜隆tovana predsjedavaju脛聡a, bli脜戮i se godina dana od one povijesne press konferencije predsjednice Komisije von der Leyen s Vu脛聧i脛聡em kada je rekla da je on veliki borac za vladavinu prava. Evo, pro脜隆lo je 11 mjeseci i stvari su se drasti脛聧no, za 180 stupnjeva promijenile.

Promijenile su se zahvaljuju脛聡i gra脛聭anima Srbije koji su iza脜隆li na ulicu i hvala im jo脜隆 jednom da su promijenili atmosferu i u ovom parlamentu, a dobro je da se ta atmosfera sada jako mijenja i u Komisiji.

Kao 脜隆to smo 脛聧uli iz dosada脜隆nje rasprave, svega nekoliko uistinu radikalno desnih neofa脜隆isti脛聧kih zastupnika podr脜戮ava Vu脛聧i脛聡a. Mislim da je velika ve脛聡ina shvatila 脜隆to se de脜隆ava u Srbiji. I pred nama je sada samo pitanje: Kako i 脜隆to dalje?

Ja o脛聧ekujem da 脛聡e gra脛聭ani Srbije nastaviti sa svojom borbom i da 脛聡e se zalagati ne samo za vladavinu prava nego i za ljudska prava i za demokraciju.

Ja im mogu obe脛聡ati da 脛聡emo mi to raditi s na脜隆e strane u Europskoj uniji i nadam se da 脛聡emo se onda jednoga dana zajedni脛聧ki na脛聡i u ovoj prostoriji.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Matej Tonin (PPE). 芒聙聯 Gospa predsednica.脗聽Protesti. Pravica do zbiranja je nekaj najbolj normalnega v vseh zahodnoevropskih demokrati脛聧nih dr脜戮avah, zato to ne bi smelo biti niti presene脛聧enje za srbsko vlado.

Demokrata od avtokrata lahko zelo hitro razlo脛聧i脜隆 po tem, kako obvlada same proteste. Demokrat se bo zatekel k dialogu, avtokrat pa k nasilju.

脛聦e kaj, potem me v zadnjem obdobju skrbi nervoza predsednika Vu脛聧i脛聡a. Nedavno si je celo privo脜隆脛聧il, da je obto脜戮il Slovenijo in Hrva脜隆ko paktiranja proti Srbiji, in to na popolnoma nedol脜戮ni bazi, ker Slovenija in Hrva脜隆ka sta zaveznika v Natu in v Evropski uniji. Mislim, da to marsikaj sporo脛聧a.

In zato moramo tudi mi v tej hi脜隆i jasno sporo脛聧iti protestnikom, da smo na njihovi strani in na njihovi demokrati脛聧ni pravici.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Chlo脙漏 Ridel (S&D). 芒聙聯 Madame la Pr脙漏sidente, chers coll脙篓gues, depuis pr脙篓s d'un an, le mouvement citoyen contre la corruption et pour la d脙漏mocratie en Serbie ne faiblit pas. Ce mouvement non violent est men脙漏 par la jeunesse: des jeunes travailleurs, des 脙漏tudiants qui occupent leurs facult脙漏s, dorment 脙聽 m脙陋me le sol dans leurs salles de classe, organisent les plus grandes manifestations de l'histoire du pays, parcourent leur pays, m脙陋me 脙聽 v脙漏lo, jusqu'aux plus petits villages, pour informer leur peuple et le convaincre de se lever contre la d脙漏rive autoritaire du chef de l'脙聣tat, Aleksandar脗聽Vu脛聧i脛聡.

Aujourd'hui, ce mouvement citoyen pacifique est durement r脙漏prim脙漏. Les manifestants sont frapp脙漏s, arr脙陋t脙漏s, intimid脙漏s par des forces suppl脙漏tives compos脙漏es de nervis du pouvoir, qui sont masqu脙漏s, qui sont arm脙漏s de barres de fer. Le pouvoir explique d脙漏sormais que le mouvement citoyen en Serbie est un complot 脙漏tranger. Les manifestations serbes sont trait脙漏es, au choix, de terroristes ou de nazies.

Alors que faisons-nous? Presque rien. En France, Emmanuel脗聽Macron a m脙陋me accueilli Aleksandar脗聽Vu脛聧i脛聡 脙聽 l'脙聣lys脙漏e, sans rien dire 脙聽 propos des manifestations. Nous nous aplatirions, nous l'Europe, devant Trump, mais nous ne serions pas capables de soutenir un mouvement citoyen pour la d脙漏mocratie qui se d脙漏roule sur notre continent, dans un pays candidat 脙聽 l'Union europ脙漏enne et qui demande notre soutien? Que deviendront nos valeurs si nous ne les d脙漏fendons pas? Elles s'脙漏teindront.

Je veux dire 脙聽 la jeunesse serbe et 脙聽 tous les citoyens qui la suivent: votre combat est le n脙麓tre. L'Europe doit tendre la main et elle doit peser pour l'organisation d'脙漏lections r脙漏ellement libres et d脙漏mocratiques en Serbie.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Dan Barna (Renew). 芒聙聯 Madam President, let us set the scene in the streets of Belgrade: what we are witnessing is a Government, a candidate for EU membership, unleashing brutal violence against its own people.

The Vu脛聧i脛聡 regime芒聙聶s crackdown on peaceful, democratic protesters is an affront to everything this Union stands for. The images of police beating students, of citizens being tear-gassed are a stain on the conscience of Europe.

Let me be clear: a government that attacks its own youth, that silences dissent with batons, is walking away from Europe, not towards it. The principles of democracy, human rights, and the rule of law are not negotiable talking points; they are the very foundations of our community.

To the brave students and citizens of Serbia: we see you. We stand with you. Your fight for a democratic future is our fight. This Parliament will not look away.

Serbia芒聙聶s place is in Europe, but a European Serbia cannot be built on fear and violence.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Liudas Ma脜戮ylis (PPE). 芒聙聯 Pirmininke, komisare, kolegos. Serbijoje 脜隆iandien regime demokratijos nuosmuk脛炉. Protestai prie脜隆 vald脜戮i脛聟 mal脜隆inami brutalia j脛聴ga, smurtaujama prie脜隆 opozicij脛聟 ir nepriklausomus 脜戮urnalistus, sistemingai silpninama teisin脛聴 valstyb脛聴. O vaizdai Belgrade labai ai脜隆kiai primena 脛炉vykius 2020脗聽m. Baltarusijoje. Visgi Serbija dar netapo diktat脜芦ra, bet reikia pripa脜戮inti, kad dabartin脛聴 valstyb脛聴s kryptis n脛聴ra suderinama su Europos S脛聟jungos vertyb脛聴mis. Jeigu 脜隆iandienin脛聴 Baltarusija simbolizuoja Kremliaus pergal脛聶, Serbija vis dar turi pasirinkimo galimyb脛聶 芒聙聯 gr脛炉脜戮ti 脛炉 demokratin脛炉 keli脛聟. O Europa privalo tikslingai veikti ir pad脛聴ti priimti teising脛聟 pasirinkim脛聟. Situacijai nesikei脛聧iant, nereik脛聴t脜鲁 atmesti ir tikslini脜鲁 sankcij脜鲁 atsakingiems u脜戮 smurt脛聟 vald脜戮ios pareig脜芦nams. Neleiskime Serbijai tapti dar vienu Rusijos satelitu.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Matja脜戮 Nemec (S&D). 芒聙聯 Gospa predsednica.脗聽Spo脜隆tovani dr脜戮avljanke in dr脜戮avljani Republike Srbije! Naj vam najprej izrazim globoko spo脜隆tovanje in priznanje. Vsem nam, ki verjamemo v demokrati脛聧ne institucije, svobodo, pravno dr脜戮avo in mir, dajete upanje in mo脛聧.

Bitki, ki traja mnogo dlje od zadnjih 10 mesecev, ste novembra lansko leto dodali novo dimenzijo, in sicer jakost in mo脛聧.

Vi, va脜隆a vztrajnost in enotnost ste sprememba, ki jo dr脜戮ava potrebuje, da se upre sistemati脛聧nemu pogromu demokracije, trdovratni korupciji in obra脛聧unavanju z vsemi kriti脛聧nimi glasovi na 脛聧elu z javnimi uslu脜戮benci, profesorji, mediji, dekani in vsemi ostalimi.

Zabele脜戮enih je na stotine napadov na novinarje v zadnjem letu, desetine priprtih dr脜戮avljanov, uveden je politi脛聧ni nadzor nad 脜隆e zadnjimi neodvisnimi medijskimi hi脜隆ami.

Vseh obsodb vredna dejanja politi脛聧nega vrha zahtevajo ukrepanje tudi Unije, in ne le v medlih, zaskrbljenih odzivih.

Kako dolgo bomo 脜隆e financirali re脜戮im, ki deluje proti svojim ljudem? Trdno stopimo na stran ljudi, ki si 脜戮elijo svobodnih volitev in bolj脜隆e evropske prihodnosti. Represija je zadnje oro脜戮je tistih, ki vedo, da so oblast 脜戮e izgubili.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Se脙隆n Kelly (PPE). 芒聙聯 A Uachtar脙隆in, a Choimisin脙漏ir, the scenes of force used against protesters in Serbia are completely unacceptable.

Let us be clear: the right to assemble and to voice opposition to government is a basic democratic freedom, and it must be upheld, particularly in an aspiring EU Member State.

Reports of unlawful crowd control tactics, intimidation, misuse of personal data, arrests of students and activists, and even spyware aimed at journalists have no place in an EU candidate country.

We all want Serbia to succeed on its path to membership, but the enlargement process is and must be about the values put into practice. The rule of law situation in Serbia and, above all, the State's response to protests and the ambivalent attitude to Russia and Ukraine must change if accession is to move forward.

President Vu脛聧i脛聡's SNS remains an associate member of the EPP, but it is precisely for that reason that our group is firm in our demand for change and for greater respect and adherence to fundamental rights and values.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Andreas Schieder (S&D). 芒聙聯 Madam脗聽President, Madam脗聽Commissioner, since the tragic collapse of the roof in Novi Sad, too many peaceful protesters have been threatened, tear gassed, defamed as terrorists and beaten up. Too many heads of students have been beaten by police batons and commanded by Vu脛聧i脛聡, the President of Serbia, himself. Too many red lines have been crossed. Yet still Vu脛聧i脛聡 is a member of the European People's Party, but hopefully not for very long in the future.

What we need is targeted sanctions, clear words. We have rightfully condemned the police brutality and the oppression through violence and everything that happened. Now we need to do more than just to condemn; we need to act. Targeted sanctions and also clear words by the European institutions like also the Commissioner was finding yesterday. It is our duty to support the people of Serbia and their fight for their freedom. It is in favour of Serbia, but against the brutal regime of Aleksandar Vu脛聧i脛聡.

脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Ingeborg Ter Laak (PPE). 芒聙聯 Voorzitter, er vallen doden bij de protesten in Servi脙芦, terwijl het in dit Parlement vrij stil blijft over dit toetredingsland. Ik wil de commissaris dan ook bedanken voor haar sterke opening. Inmiddels zijn er honderden mensen gearresteerd, pleegt de overheid grootschalige corruptie, maakt de politie zich schuldig aan excessief geweld en worden de laatste onafhankelijke media in Servi脙芦 bedreigd. Partijkantoren worden in brand gestoken.

De inwoners van Servi脙芦 vragen om nieuwe, onafhankelijke en geobserveerde verkiezingen. De greep van president Vu脛聧i脛聡 wordt echter steeds strakker en tegenstanders vrezen steeds meer voor verdere repressie. Democratische waarden, zoals de rechtsstaat, worden niet gewaarborgd.

Wij, als Europese lidstaten, hebben gezegd dat Servi脙芦 kandidaat-lidstaat is voor de EU. Dan verwacht je dat Europa actie onderneemt en dat wij naast de inwoners van Servi脙芦 gaan staan en hen helpen bij het hervormen en het verankeren van een sterke democratie en rechtsstaat voor Servi脙芦.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Marta Temido (S&D). 芒聙聯 Senhora Presidente, Senhora Comiss脙隆ria, na S脙漏rvia, os confrontos entre manifestantes, sobretudo jovens estudantes, e os apoiantes do Partido Progressista S脙漏rvio e do presidente Vu脛聧i脛聡 sucedem-se desde h脙隆 quase um ano, quando aconteceu a trag脙漏dia de Novi Sad.

A exig脙陋ncia inicial de apuramento de responsabilidades transformou-se em den脙潞ncia do autoritarismo, da corrup脙搂脙拢o, e na exig脙陋ncia de elei脙搂脙碌es antecipadas, fazendo subir a intensidade da repress脙拢o policial, que o comiss脙隆rio para os Direitos Humanos do Conselho da Europa j脙隆 classificou como desproporcional.

脙聣, por isso, preciso que as institui脙搂脙碌es europeias condenem claramente esta situa脙搂脙拢o, apelem para a urgente redu脙搂脙拢o das tens脙碌es e se envolvam na media脙搂脙拢o do conflito, para que o respeito pelas regras do Estado de Direito seja reposto.

O risco de fratura da sociedade civil e de radicaliza脙搂脙拢o das for脙搂as pol脙颅ticas pr脙鲁- e anti-Uni脙拢o Europeia 脙漏 real e perigoso. E n脙拢o ser脙隆 s脙鲁 o futuro europeu da S脙漏rvia que dar脙隆 um passo atr脙隆s se isso acontecer, mas tamb脙漏m as nossas expectativas pol脙颅ticas de alargamento.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Sun脛聧ana Glavak (PPE). 芒聙聯 Po脜隆tovana predsjedavaju脛聡a, po脜隆tovana povjerenice, kolegice i kolege, ono 脜隆to danas vidimo u Srbiji definitivno nije demokracija. To su prosvjedi ugu脜隆eni silom, to su studenti nazivani neprijateljima dr脜戮ave, to su mediji pod pritiskom i istina u脜隆utkana. Takvo pona脜隆anje vlasti nije dijalog, to je logika straha, rekla bih, postmodernog autokrata.

I zato moramo jasno re脛聡i: to nije put u Europsku uniju, jer Europa se gradi na slobodi govora, odgovornosti, po脜隆tovanju ljudskog dostojanstva.

Vlada koja gu脜隆i medije i progla脜隆ava vlastite gra脛聭ane prijetnjom udaljava Srbiju od europske obitelji, ali i retorika nekih iz oporbe i s prosvjeda o Velikoj Srbiji, otvorena ili prikrivena, nedopustiva je.

Europska integracija nije trgovina vrijednostima. S jedne strane dodvoravanje Rusiji i Kini za ja脛聧anje legitimiteta, otvoreni nacionalizam, a s druge strane o脛聧ekivanje potpore Europske unije. Takvu dvostruku igru ne smijemo nagraditi.

Zaklju脛聧it 脛聡u, put u Europu vodi preko reformskih procesa, preko demokracije, nikada preko represije.

Catch-the-eye procedure

脗聽脗聽Sandro Ruotolo (S&D). 芒聙聯 Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, ringrazio la Commissaria per il suo intervento e per le sue parole.

Io vorrei sviluppare un piccolo, come dire, paragrafo del suo intervento, che 脙篓 fondamentale a mio giudizio perch脙漏 dove non c'脙篓 libert脙聽 di stampa non c'脙篓 democrazia, e quindi ci dobbiamo porre il problema dell'adesione della Serbia in Europa.

In Serbia fare il giornalista significa essere esposti a minacce e a violenze quotidiane. Secondo Reporters sans fronti脙篓res, dall'inizio dell'anno si contano 65 aggressioni fisiche, mentre la Federazione europea dei giornalisti parla di oltre 180 casi di minacce, violenze e pressioni politiche nei primi otto mesi del 2025: cronisti picchiati, inginocchiati e immobilizzati dalla polizia, criminalizzati dal governo e definiti addirittura terroristi.

La situazione peggiora anche dal punto di vista del pluralismo: canali indipendenti subiscono restrizioni nella distribuzione, Al Jazeera ha chiuso, Radio Free Europe rischia la stessa sorte.

La Serbia 脙篓 oggi al 96脗掳 posto nell'indice della libert脙聽 di stampa nel mondo, penultima tra i paesi candidati all'Unione europea.

PRE脠聵EDIN脠職IA: NICOLAE 脠聵TEF脛聜NU脠職脛聜
Vicepre脠聶edinte

脗聽
脗聽脗聽

脗聽脗聽Petr Bystron (ESN). 芒聙聯 Herr Pr脙陇sident, liebe Kollegen! Ich bin schon sehr erstaunt dar脙录ber, was Sie hier erz脙陇hlt haben, und vor allem auch 脙录ber die unw脙录rdige Veranstaltung, die Sie zu Serbien heute hier im Hause abgehalten haben. Sie haben hier Opposition aus einem Land angekarrt, die hier darum betteln sollte脗聽芒聙聯 gegen Korruption. Die EU soll gegen Korruption in Serbien helfen? Hallo, bitte sch脙露n! Hier: Die Chefin der EU-Kommission steht unter Korruptionsverdacht, gegen die wird ermittelt, und da soll jemand helfen!

N脙陇chster Punkt: Unterdr脙录ckung der Opposition, und Sie wollen den Protesten helfen. Wo waren Sie denn, als die Menschen in Bulgarien protestiert haben gegen die Regierung, weil sie ihnen ein Referendum verweigert hat, worauf sie ein Recht haben? Wo waren Sie, als die Rum脙陇nen demonstriert haben, weil ihnen die Pr脙陇sidentschaftswahlen gestohlen wurden?

Sie sind totale Heuchler, Sie picken sich immer nur die L脙陇nder heraus, in denen es noch keine Pro-EU-Regierungen gibt. Und Vu脛聧i脛聡 ist ein starker Anf脙录hrer, der will ein starkes Serbien, und das stinkt Ihnen, und deswegen unterst脙录tzen Sie seine Gegner.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Lukas Sieper (NI). 芒聙聯 Herr Pr脙陇sident, liebe Menschen Europas! Es wundert mich 脙录berhaupt nicht, dass der Kollege von der AfD einen starken F脙录hrer bewundert. Was mich ein bisschen mehr wundert, ist, dass der Abgeordnete, gegen den strafrechtliche Ermittlungen laufen, weil er sich von den Russen hat schmieren lassen脗聽芒聙聯脗聽mutma脙聼lich脗聽芒聙聯, nun die Korruption hier anprangert. Was mich wiederum gar nicht so wundert, ist, dass er etwas gegen Opposition hat, weil er sich ja von einem Regime schmieren l脙陇sst, das Opposition auch nicht zul脙陇sst.

Mr脗聽President, dear colleagues, the Serbian students show a strong commitment against one-man rule.

And let me say this directly to President Vu脛聧i脛聡: the joy that you take in watching the police beat down peaceful students, it will not last 芒聙聯 because the Serbian people will hold you accountable, if not now, then at the ballot box. This is a fight for a pluralist, democratic future, fought by the youth. So it's not a question of if you lose this fight, but only when.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Diana Iovanovici 脜聻o脜聼oac脛聝 (NI). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, da, v脛聝 aud pe to脠聸i vorbind aici. Nu 脠聶tiu c脙垄脠聸i dintre dumneavoastr脛聝 ave脠聸i leg脛聝turi cu Serbia. Bunicul meu patern era s脙垄rb, a脠聶a c脛聝 脠聶tiu foarte multe lucruri de acolo.

脠聵tiu c脛聝 tot ceea ce se 脙庐nt脙垄mpl脛聝 acum este sub imperiul divide et impera, pentru c脛聝 Serbia, evident, a fost un proiect al Uniunii Europene pornit de c脛聝tre Funda脠聸ia Soros 脙庐mpreun脛聝 cu Departamentul de Stat al Statelor Unite ale Americii. Dup脛聝 venirea lui Trump, evident c脛聝 proiectul USAID s-a retras 脠聶i atunci Uniunea European脛聝 a trebuit s脛聝 compenseze ceea ce Statele Unite nu au mai dat acolo.

Eu 脙庐i rog pe s脙垄rbi s脛聝 nu cad脛聝 脙庐n aceast脛聝 capcan脛聝 脠聶i s脛聝 nu fac脛聝 jocul funda脠聸iilor sorosiste, care, ca 脠聶i 脙庐n Rom脙垄nia, ca 脠聶i 脙庐n Bulgaria, 脙庐ncearc脛聝 s脛聝 pun脛聝 s脙垄rbi contra s脙垄rbi. 脙聨i rog frumos s脛聝 se uneasc脛聝 脠聶i s脛聝 lupte 脙庐mpotriva acestor interese meschine ale Uniunii Europene, pentru c脛聝 Serbia poate s脛聝 de脠聸in脛聝 acolo un important hub al Balcanilor 脙庐n ceea ce prive脠聶te hidrocarburile ruse脠聶ti 脠聶i chiar, 脙庐n cazul 脙庐n care Ucraina pierde, 脠聶i chiar acolo un punct economic important.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽脗聽

(脙聨ncheierea interven脠聸iilor la cerere)

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Marta Kos, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Mr President, honourable Members, I have taken good note of your concerns as regards the developments in Serbia and their impact on Serbia's European path. And I am concerned, too.

Today's debate has once again shown the importance of adherence to EU values in our candidate countries. It has also shown that we should speak up. This is 芒聙聯 and will remain 芒聙聯 at the heart of the EU accession process, and it also extends to the EU common foreign and security policy. The people in Serbia deserve a European future. The prospect of EU membership offers to transform societies in a comprehensive and sustainable way, based on democratic values and principles.

The Commission will continue with our strong engagement with Serbia to ensure that it remains on its EU path and overcomes the current political impasse. We will continue engaging with the authorities and other stakeholders, especially civil society, addressing developments, the tensions and establishing of conditions for a dialogue across society for Serbia to advance on its EU path.

For this to happen, very important trust among all the stakeholders has to be restored, pressure on civil society stopped and violence against the protesters, too. I will in particular continue with constructive engagement on the requirements for opening Cluster 3, as I truly believe in Serbia's European future. But Serbia has to deliver.

At the same time, trust in the sincerity of Serbia's commitment to the EU path has been decreasing, and we should really look at what is happening and where the politicians of Serbia are going. This is making the Commission's engagement and my engagement more difficult. An ambiguous narrative on the EU, coupled with the latest derogatory statements on some Members of the European Parliament, are certainly not what the EU expects from a candidate country.

We count on the European Parliament. We count on you, dear Members of Parliament, to continue supporting the Commission in bringing democratic Serbia to the European family.

When there is a candidate country, there are two important responsibilities and commitments: first, the candidate country has to deliver, but it is also our responsibility to help a candidate country to remain on the EU path. We owe this to the people of Serbia, too.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Pre脜聼edinte. 芒聙聯 Dezbaterea este 脙庐nchis脛聝.

脗聽

17. Strengthening Moldova芒聙聶s resilience against Russian hybrid threats and malign interference (debate)
Video of the speeches
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Pre脜聼edinte. 芒聙聯 Urm脛聝torul punct de pe ordinea de zi este dezbaterea privind Declara脠聸ii ale Consiliului 脠聶i ale Comisiei referitoare la 脙庐nt脛聝rirea rezilien脠聸ei Republicii Moldova 脙庐n fa脠聸a amenin脠聸脛聝rilor hibride 脠聶i a ingerin脠聸elor r脛聝uvoitoare ale Rusiei [2025/2811(RSP)].

Colegi, o 脙庐ntreag脛聝 na脠聸iune ne prive脠聶te 脙庐n acest moment. Pentru mine este o onoare s脛聝 conduc aceast脛聝 dezbatere 脠聶i a脠聶tept s脛聝 avem o dezbatere bun脛聝. Am avut-o 脠聶i pe pre脠聶edinta Maia Sandu ast脛聝zi, al脛聝turi de noi, a脠聶a c脛聝 o invit din nou pe doamna comisar Kos, care cunoa脠聶te bine Moldova, a fost de mai multe ori acolo, s脛聝 ne prezinte situa脠聸ia din partea Comisiei.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Marta Kos, Member of the Commission. 芒聙聯 Mr President, I think this is a very special occasion also for you. I am very happy to be able to speak about Moldova, and yes, indeed, I know the country more and more, but before Moldova will become a member of the EU, I will visit it many, many times.

Now, I have just returned from a three-day trip to Moldova and I can share from first-hand experience 芒聙聯 it is really not an exaggeration 芒聙聯 that, in less than three weeks from now, Moldova faces parliamentary elections of historic significance, for the country's future place in Europe and for the security at our eastern borders.脗聽More than ever, Europe stands by Moldova's side. Despite the war in neighbouring Ukraine and despite the hybrid war Russia is waging against the country, Moldova and its people have shown incredible resilience. The country is rapidly progressing on its EU path. It deserves our full support.

The EU-Moldova summit in July was another sign of our deep and intense engagement with the country. It has reaffirmed our shared objective to firmly support Moldova on its path to EU membership. People of Moldova want security, prosperity, better salaries and pensions. They want a justice system that serves justice, not oligarchs, and that puts corrupted politicians and officials behind bars. The positive change in Moldova is real. This is visible to anyone who visits the country regularly. Moldova's security is inseparable from Europe's own.

As the parliamentary election on 28脗聽September approaches, we can clearly see Russia intensifying its hybrid attacks on Moldova's democracy and stability with blatant lies, like that once Moldova will become a member of the EU, the EU will tear down all the Orthodox churches. This is a strategy of disinformation campaigns, illicit financing of political proxies, cyber attacks, energy blackmail and unprecedented vote-buying. The EU will always defend the right of Moldovan people to choose its representatives freely and without external interference and coercion. We are actively responding 芒聙聯 and I am very proud of this 芒聙聯 to Moldovan authorities' requests to add our support to their relentless efforts to protect the integrity of democratic processes that Russia and its proxies are constantly trying to undermine. To do so, we are mobilising all available instruments of EU support.

First, in February, I have signed a historic energy package that lays out a strategy to decouple Moldova from Russian energy supplies. It will make Moldova fully energy independent by 2027. The implementation is currently ahead of schedule.

Secondly, in May, with the overwhelming support of this House 芒聙聯 and I really thank you, I signed the growth plan, a historic investment and reform package of MDL脗聽38 billion last week 芒聙聯 EUR脗聽1.9 billion. I already announced the second disbursement, bringing it to a total of almost EUR脗聽300 million. Also here, implementation of the reforms is ahead of the schedule.

Third, Moldova was the first country with which the EU signed the security and defence partnership in 2024. It offers a robust political framework to enhance our existing cooperation. We provide targeted support to enhance cyber security and to combat illegal financial flows, as well as foreign information manipulation and interference.

Under the European Peace Facility, we have allocated EUR脗聽197 million to strengthen Moldova's armed forces, making Moldova the second-largest recipient of bilateral EPF support after Ukraine. In addition to this support, EU sanctions against those seeking to destabilise Moldova, in place since 2023, includes 4 rounds of listings, bringing the total of 23 individuals and 5 entities.

We stand always ready to extend support with our hybrid rapid response teams whenever deemed necessary by the Moldovan authorities to reinforce their capacities. Our experts are also learning from such partnerships with the Moldovan counterparts, and we will use this knowledge and skills in the future for all of us.

President, honourable Members, Moldova's future is in the European Union, and we are doing what it takes to bring the country closer, accelerate the benefits of EU accession, integrate its economy in the single market, and improve the lives of Moldovan citizens. Moldova has shown determination and results to deliver on reforms. The bilateral screening process is set to finish later this month. It means that all the clusters will be ready to be open. The speed at which it has been completed is a testament to Moldova's commitment to its EU path. For our part, we are committed 芒聙聯 and me especially 芒聙聯 to advancing Moldova's accession process as swiftly as possible, without compromising the quality of the reforms. Yes, we are committed to Moldova's European future in words, but also in actions, and this is a strategic investment in the country, its neighbours and the European Union.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Andrzej Halicki, on behalf of the PPE Group. 芒聙聯 Mr脗聽President, Madam脗聽Commissioner, dear colleagues, we've heard a very strong message today.

President Maia Sandu said clearly to us that this is about the security of Moldova, but also the security of Europe. And this is true. The Republic of Moldova currently is a security provider for Europe.

This is the reason the disinformation campaign is so huge, and this is the reason Russian activity is so visible. Why? Because the Kremlin and Putin want to change the government, want the government to collapse. Why? Because they would like to change the pro-European way into a pro-Russian way.

Is it expected by the Moldovans? Of course it is not. Moldovans would like to live in peace. They would like to live with a better standard of life. They would like to be with us, together with a safe Europe, integrated with also our market.

So, I would like to say to all Moldovans, you can count on us. The report is also on security; it is not only on the technical process of enlargement. And I would like to say: Moldova will resist. The Russian plan will fail. Tr脛聝iasc脛聝 Moldova!脗聽Long live Moldova!

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Sven Mikser, on behalf of the S&D Group. 芒聙聯 Mr脗聽President, Commissioner, dear colleagues, earlier today, we had the chance to listen to a very clear and powerful address by Moldovan President Maia Sandu. And I am happy to say that her words express exactly the same sentiment that forms the core of the resolution that we are going to be voting on tomorrow.

As President Sandu stressed, the outcome of the parliamentary elections that will take place on 28脗聽September is going to be crucial for the future direction of the country, but it is also going to be a test for all of Europe. This election will decide whether Moldova manages to consolidate its democratic path towards EU membership, or is going to be pulled in a different direction by the external forces that want to derail the legitimate aspirations of the Moldovan people and also want to destabilise our continent. By those dark forces, of course, I mean Putin's Russia and its proxies.

Our Parliament's resolution on strengthening Moldova's resilience is a direct response to the challenges of this critical moment. It's a statement of unwavering solidarity built on three central pillars. First, we strongly condemned Russia's malicious interference, or what President Sandu called an 'unlimited hybrid war' of 'unseen scale'. The resolution denounces these actions from illicit financing and vote-buying to a broad variety of disinformation and intimidation operations, and calls on Russia to respect Moldova's sovereignty and integrity.

Secondly, we remain committed to helping Moldova to boost its resilience against these malicious operations. The tactics that Russia is deploying against Moldova are a blueprint for future similar operations targeting other European nations.

And finally, we remain committed to supporting Moldova's European aspirations. The impressive progress Moldova has made is a testament to its commitment to reform process, and we must recognise these achievements by upholding the principle that a candidate country's path to EU membership is determined by its own merit. We therefore urge the Council and Commission to swiftly open talks on the first clusters.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Pierre-Romain Thionnet, au nom du groupe PfE. 芒聙聯 Monsieur le Pr脙漏sident, qui peut nier que la Moldavie int脙漏resse au plus haut point la Russie?

L'observateur attentif qui ouvre une carte de l'Europe trouvera ce petit 脙聣tat nich脙漏 entre la Roumanie et l'Ukraine, pays avec lequel il partage pr脙篓s de 1脗聽000脗聽kilom脙篓tres de fronti脙篓res. Relativement 脙漏loign脙漏 de la Russie, d脙漏pourvu d'une arm脙漏e ayant les moindres capacit脙漏s modernes, la Moldavie ne repr脙漏sente en rien une menace pour la s脙漏curit脙漏 de la Russie. En revanche, par sa situation g脙漏ographique, elle serait un saillant id脙漏al dans les plans du Kremlin contre l'Ukraine. Plus que cela, la Moldavie est le terrain d'essai de Moscou dans sa politique de parrainage de forces loyales ou soumises aux ambitions russes en Europe et dont Ilan脗聽脠聵or et sa galaxie sont la d脙漏plorable incarnation.

Ce constat ind脙漏niable ne peut suffire 脙聽 expliquer tous les tenants et les aboutissants de la d脙漏mocratie moldave. Gardons-nous de polariser outre mesure des enjeux 脙漏lectoraux qui ne se r脙漏duisent pas 脙聽 脙陋tre pro-europ脙漏ens ou pro-russes. Le soutien 脙聽 l'int脙漏gration europ脙漏enne ne fait que diminuer dans le pays depuis des ann脙漏es, d脙篓s avant la guerre en Ukraine, car les r脙漏formes mises en 脜聯uvre et les dons g脙漏n脙漏reux de Bruxelles sont loin d'avoir rendu florissantes l'activit脙漏 脙漏conomique et les conditions de vie des citoyens les plus modestes.

L'脙漏lecteur qui ne soutient pas ou ne soutient plus Maia脗聽Sandu ne veut pas pour autant que son pays devienne un satellite de Moscou. Si nous devons 脙聽 la Moldavie notre solidarit脙漏 et notre soutien face 脙聽 toute tentative russe d'en saper l'ind脙漏pendance, nous lui devons aussi la v脙漏rit脙漏 et 脙漏viter de donner l'impression que son ancrage europ脙漏en n'est tenu qu'脙聽 bout de bras depuis l'脙漏tranger.

脗聽脗聽Cristian Terhe脜聼, 脙庐n numele grupului ECR. 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, dragi colegi, Republica Moldova merit脛聝 s脛聝 fie 脙庐n UE nu ca o favoare, ci pentru c脛聝 a demonstrat deja prin fapte c脛聝 este un partener demn 脠聶i preg脛聝tit pentru acest parteneriat mutual avantajos cu restul 脠聸脛聝rilor din UE.

脙聨n primul r脙垄nd, popula脠聸ia Republicii Moldova a demonstrat c脛聝 dore脠聶te integrarea european脛聝 din convingere.

脙聨n al doilea r脙垄nd, Republica Moldova a f脛聝cut deja importan脠聸i pa脠聶i spre formarea democratic脛聝 脠聶i spre statul de drept.

脙聨n al treilea r脙垄nd, aceasta 脠聶i-a deschis economia 脠聶i a construit pun脠聸i solide cu partenerii europeni.

Povestea Moldovei este 脠聶i povestea 脠聸脛聝rilor din estul Europei ce s-au eliberat de sub jugul tiraniei comuniste, care, dup脛聝 ce 脠聶i-au dep脛聝脠聶it propriile provoc脛聝ri, mai repede sau mai t脙垄rziu, au intrat 脙庐n UE. E important s脛聝 nu l脛聝s脛聝m Republica Moldova 脙庐n urm脛聝, mai ales 脙庐n aceste vremuri tulburi.

Ezitarea 脠聶i nehot脛聝r脙垄rea 脠聸脛聝rilor vestice de a accepta Ucraina 脠聶i Georgia 脙庐n NATO, la summitul de la Bucure脠聶ti din 2008, a dat curaj Rusiei imperialiste s脛聝 anexeze teritorii din Georgia 脙庐n 2008 脠聶i din Ucraina 脙庐n 2014 脠聶i 2022. E important s脛聝 脙庐nv脛聝脠聸脛聝m din lec脠聸iile istoriei. De aceea v脛聝 solicit s脛聝 primim rapid Moldova 脙庐n UE. A dovedit c脛聝 merit脛聝.

脗聽脗聽Dan Barna, 脙庐n numele grupului Renew. 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, rezolu脠聸ia pe care o dezbatem ast脛聝zi abordeaz脛聝 o amenin脠聸are real脛聝 脠聶i grav脛聝 la adresa unei democra脠聸ii europene.脗聽Moldovenii sunt chema脠聸i pe 28 septembrie s脛聝 脙庐脠聶i aleag脛聝 Parlamentul, iar rezultatul acestor alegeri va stabili dac脛聝 Moldova 脙庐脠聶i continu脛聝 drumul spre aderarea la Uniunea European脛聝 sau dac脛聝 este din nou destabilizat脛聝 de Rusia.

Moscova desf脛聝脠聶oar脛聝 un r脛聝zboi hibrid feroce pentru a readuce Moldova 脙庐n sfera sa de influen脠聸脛聝. 脙聨n aceste luni, Moldova este laboratorul de 脙庐ncercare al strategiilor de r脛聝zboi hibrid dezvoltate de Kremlin, care injecteaz脛聝 sute de milioane de euro 脙庐n societatea moldoveneasc脛聝 pentru a cump脛聝ra voturi 脠聶i a otr脛聝vi democra脠聸ia. Folose脠聶te atacuri cibernetice, deepfake-uri 脠聶i campanii masive de dezinformare pentru a manipula buna-credin脠聸脛聝 脠聶i temerile cet脛聝脠聸enilor 脠聶i se folose脠聶te de tot 脠聶i de orice, de la energie la religie.

Pre脠聶edinta Maia Sandu ne-a avertizat chiar acum c脙垄teva ore de la acest microfon. Moldova este ast脛聝zi terenul de testare a acestei noi ofensive, dar 脠聸inta real脛聝 este Europa. Suntem 脠聶i r脛聝m脙垄nem pe deplin solidari cu Republica Moldova, care 脠聶i-a p脛聝strat democra脠聸ia 脙庐n fa脠聸a unor presiuni teribile 脠聶i vom continua s脛聝 sprijinim eforturile sale de a-脠聶i ap脛聝ra democra脠聸ia 脠聶i a-脠聶i ancora viitorul acolo unde 脙庐i este locul, 脙庐n interiorul Uniunii Europene.

脗聽脗聽Villy S脙赂vndal, for Verts/ALE-Gruppen. 芒聙聯 Om f脙楼 uger g脙楼r Moldova til valg, og der er heldigvis mange, der 脙赂nsker at blive en del af Det Europ脙娄iske F脙娄llesskab. Jeg synes i 脙赂vrigt, det er bem脙娄rkelsesv脙娄rdigt, at lande st脙楼r i k脙赂 for at blive medlem af EU. Det siger noget om attraktionen, mens der er andre lande, der truer med at tvinge landet ind, der ikke 脙赂nsker det. Det siger noget om det modsatte. Jeg ser frem til at rejse til Moldova for at f脙赂lge valget som observat脙赂r her om et par uger, og derfor har jeg ogs脙楼 v脙娄ret mere diplomatisk i min tale i dag, end jeg egentlig havde lyst til. Men presset fra 脙聵st og fors脙赂get p脙楼 fra en r脙娄kke lande at tr脙娄kke v脙娄k fra Europa med b脙赂lger af desinformation er voldsomt stort. Der er tale om et koordineret angreb for at undergrave et demokrati. Derfor er vi n脙赂dt til at fort脙娄lle moldoverne, b脙楼de dem, der bor i Moldova, og dem, der bor her i EU. Hvis det er jeres 脙赂nske, s脙楼 er I velkommen i vores europ脙娄iske f脙娄llesskab. Jeg er glad for, at pr脙娄sident Sandu i dag stod her i Parlamentet og mindede os om, hvor meget der er p脙楼 spil. Vi kan ikke se passivt til, mens et europ脙娄isk demokrati bliver udsat for hybride angreb af udefrakommende magter, og vi bliver n脙赂dt til at understrege, at der er en vej frem for Moldova i vores europ脙娄iske f脙娄llesskab. Hvis det er det, de 脙赂nsker.

脗聽脗聽Jonas Sj脙露stedt, f脙露r The Left gruppen. 芒聙聯 Herr talman! Om drygt tv脙楼 veckor g脙楼r Moldavien till val. Det 脙陇r inte bara ett val utan det 脙陇r ett v脙陇gval om landets framtid. Moldavien f脙露rtj脙陇nar att vara ett i verklig mening sj脙陇lvst脙陇ndigt land och en levande demokrati. Men det kr脙陇ver att man avvisar Rysslands f脙露rs脙露k att fj脙陇rrstyra s脙楼v脙陇l ekonomin som politiken i landet. Ryssland vill styra, med desinformation, med ekonomiska p脙楼tryckningar, med oligarker som finansierar l脙露gner och desinformation p脙楼 sociala medier.

Inf脙露r f脙露rra valet s脙楼g vi en rad exempel p脙楼 rena r脙露stk脙露p. Det 脙陇r v脙楼r uppgift att st脙露dja Moldaviens demokrati och sj脙陇lvst脙陇ndighet, att v脙陇rna deras m脙露jligheter att st脙楼 emot de ryska p脙楼verkansoperationerna, att hj脙陇lpa dem att bygga upp sin ekonomi. D脙陇rf脙露r att i botten finns ocks脙楼 stora ekonomiska och sociala utmaningar. Moldavien beh脙露ver framtidshopp. De beh脙露ver arbeten till sina ungdomar. De beh脙露ver en h脙露jd levnadsstandard och det g脙楼r hand i hand med att v脙陇lja den demokratiska v脙陇gen, och att v脙陇lja frihet ist脙陇llet f脙露r auktorit脙陇rt fj脙陇rrstyre fr脙楼n Ryssland.

脗聽脗聽Petr Bystron (ESN). 芒聙聯 Herr Pr脙陇sident, liebe Frau Kos, Kollegen! Maia Sandu, die Pr脙陇sidentin von Moldawien, hat hier in diesem Hause heute Morgen gesagt: Moldawien denkt und handelt schon jetzt wie die EU.

Was das in der Praxis bedeutet, davon konnte sich unser tschechischer Kollege Ond脜聶ej Dost脙隆l noch vor wenigen Wochen 脙录berzeugen. Er wollte in Moldawien an einer Konferenz teilnehmen, und man hat ihn an der Grenze mehrere Stunden festgehalten, trotz Diplomatenpass nicht reingelassen und ausgewiesen, obwohl er gew脙陇hlter Repr脙陇sentant ist hier im Europ脙陇ischen Parlament. Genauso ist es auch amerikanischen Journalisten ergangen.

Ja, die ach so demokratische Pro-EU-Regierung in Moldawien denkt und handelt tats脙陇chlich jetzt schon wie die EU: Sie will keine Diskussion, sie will keine Menschen bei einer EU-kritischen Konferenz, sie will unbequeme Stimmen einfach wegsperren.

Und was macht derweil die EU? Die Kommission musste gerade jetzt zugeben, dass sie einem h脙露chst umstrittenen Journalisten-Netzwerk脗聽芒聙聯 OCCRP脗聽芒聙聯 600脗聽000脗聽Euro gezahlt hat脗聽芒聙聯 direkt nach der EU-Wahl. Nur dass Sie wissen, was OCCRP ist: Der Chef dieser Organisation, Drew Sullivan, hat gesagt, diese Organisation hat geholfen, f脙录nf Regierungen zu st脙录rzen. Die Medien in diesem Netzwerk haben das Impeachment gegen Donald Trump betrieben, sie haben die Ibiza-Aff脙陇re in 脙聳sterreich kurz vor der EU-Wahl vom Zaun gebrochen, dadurch die EU-Wahlen beeinflusst und die letzte EU-Wahl durch die Voice-of-Europe-Aff脙陇re.

Also, liebe Moldawier, willkommen in dieser EU! Hier wird der Machterhalt zelebriert durch Machtmissbrauch. Steuergelder werden daf脙录r missbraucht, Institutionen und Medien脗聽芒聙聯 nur so kann man gegen das eigene Volk regieren.

脗聽脗聽Siegfried Mure脜聼an (PPE). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, doamn脛聝 comisar脛聝, stima脠聸i colegi, 脙庐n ultimii patru ani, Republica Moldova a depus cerere de aderare la Uniunea European脛聝. A primit statutul de stat candidat. Statele membre ale Uniunii Europene, la solicitarea Parlamentului European, ca urmare a recomand脛聝rii Comisiei Europene, au decis 脙庐n mod unanim c脛聝 Republica Moldova devine stat candidat pentru aderarea la Uniunea European脛聝 脠聶i a decis, de asemenea, c脛聝 Republica Moldova poate 脙庐ncepe negocierile de aderare.

Aceste negocieri sunt preg脛聝tite 脠聶i ele trebuie s脛聝 脙庐nceap脛聝 foarte cur脙垄nd. Acest lucru 脙庐l cerem 脠聶i prin rezolu脠聸ia Parlamentului European. Republica Moldova a 脙庐nceput reforme esen脠聸iale, inclusiv 脙庐n domeniul justi脠聸iei. Republica Moldova a dep脛聝脠聶it dou脛聝 crize energetice. A r脛聝spuns, cu sprijinul nostru, la dou脛聝 脠聶antaje energetice din partea Federa脠聸iei Ruse, iar Republica Moldova a oferit ajutor oamenilor din Ucraina care c脛聝utau securitate.

脙聨n acela脠聶i timp, noi, Uniunea European脛聝, am sprijinit un pachet de sprijin economic de 1,9脗聽miliarde pentru urm脛聝torii trei ani, prin care vom ajuta ca 脙庐n Republica Moldova 脠聶colile s脛聝 devin脛聝 mai moderne, spitalele s脛聝 devin脛聝 mai moderne, drumurile s脛聝 devin脛聝 mai bune 脠聶i Republica Moldova s脛聝 fie legat脛聝, inclusiv energetic, de 脠聸脛聝ri libere, democratice din Uniunea European脛聝, pentru ca niciodat脛聝, 脙庐n viitor, Federa脠聸ia Rus脛聝 s脛聝 nu mai poat脛聝 脠聶antaja 脠聶i amenin脠聸a Republica Moldova, cum a f脛聝cut-o 脙庐n trecut.

Spunem foarte clar: Republica Moldova nu este singur脛聝. O vom ajuta pe drumul integr脛聝rii europene, fiindc脛聝 脠聶tim c脛聝 a ajuta Republica Moldova este 脠聶i sprijin pentru Uniunea European脛聝. O Republic脛聝 Moldov脛聝 puternic脛聝 脠聶i sigur脛聝 脙庐nseamn脛聝 脠聶i o Uniune European脛聝 mai sigur脛聝 脠聶i vreau s脛聝 spun foarte clar: 脙庐n timp ce Rusia dore脠聶te s脛聝 sl脛聝beasc脛聝 Republica Moldova, noi dorim s脛聝 脙庐nt脛聝rim Republica Moldova, o republic脛聝 Moldov脛聝 c脙垄t mai puternic脛聝, condus脛聝 de un guvern pro-european, fiindc脛聝 doar un guvern pro-european poate duce Republica Moldova 脙庐n Uniunea European脛聝.

脗聽脗聽Marta Temido (S&D). 芒聙聯 Presidente, Senhora Comiss脙隆ria, a Mold脙隆via simboliza hoje a escolha e o compromisso de todo um povo com um futuro europeu. N脙拢o apenas porque essa foi a vontade que os seus eleitores exprimiram no referendo de h脙隆 um ano sobre a inclus脙拢o na Constitui脙搂脙拢o da via pr脙鲁-europeia, mas tamb脙漏m porque, perante a constante interfer脙陋ncia maligna da R脙潞ssia e as v脙隆rias amea脙搂as h脙颅bridas 芒聙聰 e falo apenas do corte de abastecimento energ脙漏tico pela R脙潞ssia 脙聽 regi脙拢o da Transn脙颅stria no in脙颅cio do inverno 芒聙聰, o pa脙颅s mant脙漏m-se firmemente comprometido com o processo de reformas tendente 脙聽 integra脙搂脙拢o europeia.

As pr脙鲁ximas elei脙搂脙碌es legislativas, de 28 de setembro, ser脙拢o um momento decisivo para consolidar este caminho. N脙拢o 脙漏, por isso, surpreendente o receio de novas campanhas de desinforma脙搂脙拢o, de ciberataques, de compra de votos. 脙聣, assim, essencial que a Uni脙拢o Europeia reforce o seu apoio pol脙颅tico, econ脙鲁mico e em mat脙漏ria de seguran脙搂a, ajudando a Mold脙隆via a resistir.

Como disse hoje a presidente Sandu, a Mold脙隆via 脙漏 o laborat脙鲁rio, mas n脙鲁s somos o alvo 芒聙聰 n脙拢o nos esque脙搂amos disso. Contamos com o seu trabalho, Senhora Comiss脙隆ria.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Adam Bielan (ECR). 芒聙聯 Mr President, Madam Commissioner, in recent years, Moldova has emerged as a key partner for the European Union in the Eastern Neighbourhood, choosing the path of reform, democracy and European integration. Yet this path is under relentless assault from the Kremlin. Russia is waging a sophisticated hybrid war, flooding the country with disinformation, financing criminal networks, manipulating religious institutions and funneling illicit money through cryptocurrencies to buy votes and destabilise elections. These are not isolated incidents. They are part of a coordinated campaign to derail Moldova's democratic development and European future.

Our message is clear: we commend Chi脠聶in脛聝u's rapid reform progress and resilience. Now, the EU institutions should match their resolve by opening cluster one swiftly and advancing negotiations strictly on merit. In parallel, Russia must cease its provocations and withdraw its forces and equipment from Transnistria. Any future settlement must uphold Moldova's sovereignty, territorial integrity and European path.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Eugen Tomac (Renew). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, doamn脛聝 comisar, 脙庐n urma Pactului Ribbentrop-Molotov, nu doar 脠聸脛聝rile baltice au fost anexate, ci 脠聶i teritoriul de peste Prut al Rom脙垄niei 脙庐n Uniunea Sovietic脛聝. Pe acest 脠聸inut, numit Basarabia, Stalin a creat o republic脛聝 脠聶i, odat脛聝 ce a fost creat脛聝, a 脙庐nceput deport脛聝rile, asasinatele 脙庐n mas脛聝 脠聶i rom脙垄nii din aceast脛聝 zon脛聝 au fost supu脠聶i unui proces de dezna脠聸ionalizare cum nu s-a mai 脙庐nt脙垄mplat nici 脙庐ntr-o alt脛聝 zon脛聝 a Uniunii Sovietice.

Odat脛聝 cu destr脛聝marea URSS, pentru ca Republica Moldova s脛聝 nu se uneasc脛聝 cu Rom脙垄nia, Rusia a declan脠聶at conflictul militar 脙庐n Transnistria 脠聶i de atunci 脙庐脠聶i men脠聸ine prezen脠聸a militar脛聝 ilegal脛聝 tocmai pentru a 脠聸ine Republica Moldova blocat脛聝. A脠聶a se explic脛聝 c脛聝 ast脛聝zi limba rom脙垄n脛聝 este limb脛聝 oficial脛聝 a Uniunii Europene, iar peste 50脗聽% din cet脛聝脠聸enii Republicii Moldova sunt 脠聶i cet脛聝脠聸eni ai Uniunii Europene prin cet脛聝脠聸enia rom脙垄n脛聝. De aceea, Rusia nu permite Republicii Moldova s脛聝 avanseze pe drumul european, iar pre脠聶edinta Maia Sandu, ast脛聝zi, a demonstrat c脙垄t se poate de clar c脛聝 interferen脠聸a Moscovei 脙庐n procesul de democratizare este extrem de periculoas脛聝.

De aceea, v脛聝 cer s脛聝 sus脠聸inem cu toat脛聝 for脠聸a procesul de integrare european脛聝 a Republicii Moldova.

脗聽脗聽Luis-Vicen脠聸iu Lazarus (NI). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, am auzit cu foarte mare aten脠聸ie discursul doamnei pre脠聶edinte Maia Sandu, pre脠聶edinta pseudo Republicii Moldova. 芒聙聻Pseudo芒聙聺 pentru c脛聝, a脠聶a cum spunea 脠聶i domnul Tomac, da, 脙庐ntr-adev脛聝r, 脙庐n conformitate cu toate tratatele interna脠聸ionale, de fapt, Moldova este a Rom脙垄niei, nu? Dar 脙庐n 1940, doi dictatori nebuni au executat un rapt teritorial 脠聶i au luat-o. Culmea ironiei e c脛聝, dup脛聝 c脛聝derea blocului de est, de脠聶i Germaniile s-au reunit, iat脛聝 c脛聝 Moldova nu s-a mai reunit cu Rom脙垄nia.

Acum eu stau 脠聶i m脛聝 g脙垄ndesc c脛聝 doamna Maia Sandu 脙庐脠聶i face probleme 脙庐n leg脛聝tur脛聝 cu alegerile. Eu zic s脛聝 nu-脠聶i fac脛聝 probleme, pentru c脛聝, a脠聶a cum 脙庐n Rom脙垄nia a脠聸i reu脠聶it s脛聝 pune脠聸i pre脠聶edinte, anul脙垄nd alegerile 脠聶i interzic脙垄nd candida脠聸i, dac脛聝, 脙庐n caz c脛聝 d脙垄nsa pierde alegerile, se anuleaz脛聝 alegerile 脠聶i acolo 脠聶i p脙垄n脛聝 la urm脛聝 tot d脙垄nsa e, pentru c脛聝, nu-i a脠聶a, d脙垄nsa este omul Bruxelles-ului.

Dar vreau s脛聝 v脛聝 脙庐ntreb ceva care mi se pare important: Oare Uniunea European脛聝 nu era aceea 脙庐n care am intrat 脙庐n ideea de a fi mai puternici 脠聶i atunci toate statele puternice 脙庐mpreun脛聝, s脛聝 constituie o uniune puternic脛聝? Pentru c脛聝 脙庐n acest moment constat c脛聝 Rom脙垄nia este falimentat脛聝 脙庐n urma punerii acestei conduceri, a acestui pre脠聶edinte, care e mai mult absent 脠聶i care nu se ocup脛聝 de treburile 脠聸脛聝rii 脠聶i turist 脙庐n Moldova, ca s脛聝 se ocupe, eventual, de cum s脛聝 (...)

脗聽脗聽Pre脜聼edinte. 芒聙聯 Mul脠聸umesc, a脠聸i dep脛聝脠聶it timpul de vorbire cu mult, 脠聶i subiectul. 脙聨n fa脠聸a plenului, Maia Sandu este pre脠聶edinta legitim脛聝 a Republicii Moldova.

脗聽脗聽David McAllister (PPE). 芒聙聯 Mr President, Madam Commissioner, ladies and gentlemen, dear colleagues, as we have heard from so many speakers tonight, and rightly so, as the Republic of Moldova approaches parliamentary elections later this month, the stakes are high 芒聙聯 not just for the country, but for Europe as a whole.

These elections on 28脗聽September are not only about the future political direction of Moldova. They are a test of trust in democratic institutions, and a test of our commitment to defending democracy where it is most under attack.

The European Parliament's resolution to be adopted tomorrow builds on our growth plan for Moldova, investing in economic resilience, democratic governance and strategic infrastructure. It is a signal of our long-term commitment. I can only echo what colleagues have said: Moldova's security is Europe's security, and we stand with the brave Moldovan citizens in their democratic choice.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Vasile D脙庐ncu (S&D). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, doamn脛聝 comisar, Republica Moldova este ast脛聝zi una dintre 脠聸脛聝rile cele mai expuse 脙庐n fa脠聸a agresiunilor hibride ale Rusiei: campanii de dezinformare, presiuni energetice, tentative de destabilizare economic脛聝 脠聶i politic脛聝.

脙聨n fa脠聸a acestui atac permanent, este foarte frumos gestul nostru de solidaritate 脠聶i acest lucru ne emo脠聸ioneaz脛聝 脠聶i pe noi, rom脙垄nii, ca 脠聶i pe fra脠聸ii no脠聶tri moldoveni, dar trebuie s脛聝 facem c脙垄teva lucruri concrete. Au fost apreciate aici, men脠聸ionate c脙垄teva lucruri concrete, ajutoarele noastre pentru Moldova, dar mai precizez c脙垄teva lucruri.

脙聨n primul r脙垄nd, trebuie s脛聝-i ajut脛聝m s脛聝 consolideze securitatea energetic脛聝 prin programe comune de ap脛聝rare digital脛聝 脠聶i prin conectarea la mecanismele noastre de r脛聝spuns rapid.

脙聨n al doilea r脙垄nd, trebuie accelerat脛聝 interconectarea energetic脛聝, astfel 脙庐nc脙垄t Chi脠聶in脛聝ul s脛聝 nu mai fie prizonierul dependen脠聸elor multiple energetice, chiar dac脛聝 s-au f脛聝cut progrese 脙庐n ultima vreme.

脠聵i nu 脙庐n ultimul r脙垄nd, este vorba de rezilien脠聸a democratic脛聝, sprijin pentru mass-media independent脛聝, combaterea dezinform脛聝rii 脠聶i sus脠聸inerea administra脠聸iei publice locale, mai ales.

Sprijinind Moldova, ne protej脛聝m 脠聶i pe noi, 脙庐nt脛聝rim flancul estic, 脙庐nt脛聝rim 脙庐ncrederea cet脛聝脠聸enilor 脙庐n proiectul nostru 脠聶i ar脛聝t脛聝m un lucru: Europa nu 脙庐脠聶i abandoneaz脛聝 vecinii, 脙庐i sprijin脛聝 s脛聝 reziste 脠聶i s脛聝 prospere 脙庐n fa脠聸a acestei agresiuni.

脗聽脗聽Mariusz Kami脜聞ski (ECR). 芒聙聯 Panie Przewodnicz脛聟cy! Pani Komisarz! Ju脜录 za kilka tygodni w Mo脜聜dawii odb脛聶d脛聟 si脛聶 wybory parlamentarne. Te wybory zadecyduj脛聟, czy Mo脜聜dawia b脛聶dzie kontynuowa脛聡 sw脙鲁j marsz ku wolno脜聸ci, czy te脜录 z tej drogi zostanie zawr脙鲁cona. Chcemy, 脜录eby Mo脜聜dawia by脜聜a nowoczesnym demokratycznym pa脜聞stwem europejskim, 脜录eby trwale wyrwa脜聜a si脛聶 z postsowieckiej strefy wp脜聜yw脙鲁w. Celem Rosji w tych wyborach jest przej脛聶cie w脜聜adzy przez skorumpowanych oligarch脙鲁w realizuj脛聟cych imperialne interesy Putina.

Wspieranie niepodleg脜聜ej Mo脜聜dawii to nie tylko oczywisty nakaz ludzkiej solidarno脜聸ci, ale r脙鲁wnie脜录 imperatyw geopolityczny. Unia musi dzia脜聜a脛聡 konsekwentnie i odpowiedzialnie. Nie jest jednak odpowiedzialnym ani m脛聟drym wzywaniem w rezolucji, kt脙鲁r脛聟 mamy przyj脛聟脛聡, w脜聜adz Mo脜聜dawii do wspierania lokalnych organizacji LGBT. Takie tematy zast脛聶pcze s脛聟 wygodne dla rosyjskiej propagandy. Dzi脜聸 Mo脜聜dawia walczy o sprawy fundamentalne, o swoj脛聟 wolno脜聸脛聡 i niepodleg脜聜o脜聸脛聡. Jeste脜聸my z wami, Mo脜聜dawianie.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Helmut Brandst脙陇tter (Renew). 芒聙聯 Mr President, Commissioner Kos, dear citizens of Moldova, your President was very welcome here today. And so are you: you are welcome to the European Union if the negotiations go well.

I visited Moldova many times, and I saw this Russian influence firsthand. This time, Russia has reportedly allocated USD脗聽350脗聽million for buying votes, corruption, intimidation and so on. That is a huge sum for a small country.

Moldova's resilience is Europe's resilience. If the Kremlin succeeds, it will embolden further aggression against Ukraine, the Western Balkans and beyond. The EU must act now. We must oppose the Russian lies with facts and truths. We need to increase our support for independent media, cybersecurity and civil society in Moldova.

We must also accelerate Moldova's EU accession process and send a clear signal: Europe stands with the Moldovan people.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Michael Gahler (PPE). 芒聙聯 Mr President, colleagues, Commissioner, I was the head of the EP election observation delegation last year for the presidential election and the referendum, and what we saw of malign influence from Russia and the proxies was already incredible. The President here today illustrated what had happened last time, and we need to be aware of what will happen next time on the 28th, when we have the next election.

That is why it is so important to support all ways, means and measures that the Moldovans can take to get their own voters in a position where they can make an informed vote, and not one where we find that they are informed through the social media in a way that they are irritated and confused about what the European Union is actually all about. That is our task, and I think we will be able to fulfil it.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Chlo脙漏 Ridel (S&D). 芒聙聯 Monsieur le Pr脙漏sident, chers coll脙篓gues, c'脙漏tait en Ukraine, en Bi脙漏lorussie et, maintenant, c'est en Moldavie: quand les citoyens d脙漏clarent leur attachement aux valeurs d脙漏mocratiques, au projet europ脙漏en lors d'un r脙漏f脙漏rendum comme celui qui a eu lieu en Moldavie en脗聽2024, Vladimir脗聽Poutine d脙漏cha脙庐ne sa folie imp脙漏riale. Vex脙漏, fr脙漏n脙漏tique, manipulateur et ridicule, il s'agite et s'ing脙篓re l脙聽 o脙鹿 personne ne l'avait invit脙漏. Ce sont de fausses informations, des montages, des anecdotes grotesques, mais aussi des achats de votes. Tous les moyens sont bons pour la Russie, pour le tyran et ses oligarques, relay脙漏s par des plateformes peu scrupuleuses.

Lorsque celle qui d脙漏range est une femme cheffe d'脙聣tat comme Maia脗聽Sandu, c'est la double peine. On l'accusera tant脙麓t d'脙陋tre psychologiquement instable, v脙漏nale, menteuse ou m脙陋me d'脙陋tre d脙漏pendante 脙聽 la drogue. Cette campagne de d脙漏sinformation russe en Moldavie s'appelle 脗芦Matriochka脗禄. Elle cherche 脙聽 priver 2脗聽millions et demi d'Europ脙漏ens de d脙漏mocratie.

Alors, 脙聽 nos voisins moldaves, 脙聽 vous, Madame la Pr脙漏sidente Maia脗聽Sandu, nous vous le redisons, vous pouvez compter sur nous pour d脙漏noncer cette ing脙漏rence insupportable et d脙漏fendre la paix et la d脙漏mocratie sur notre continent europ脙漏en. Vous avez toute votre place dans la famille europ脙漏enne. Vous m脙漏ritez des 脙漏lections libres, 脙漏quitables et justes. Ne laissons pas des tyrans m脙漏galomanes et corrompus voler votre avenir, qui est aussi le n脙麓tre.

脗聽脗聽Ma脜聜gorzata Gosiewska (ECR). 芒聙聯 Panie Przewodnicz脛聟cy! 28 wrze脜聸nia obywatele Mo脜聜dawii zdecyduj脛聟 o przysz脜聜o脜聸ci swojego pa脜聞stwa. Tak samo jak wcze脜聸niej niszczy脜聜a Ukrain脛聶 czy Gruzj脛聶, wp脜聜ywa脜聜a na spo脜聜ecze脜聞stwa poprzez dezinformacj脛聶, cyberataki, nielegalne finansowanie partii czy manipulacje opini脛聟 publiczn脛聟. To r脙鲁wnie脜录 pr脙鲁ba 芒聙聻rozmontowania芒聙聺 bezpiecze脜聞stwa w regionie.

Dlatego naszym obowi脛聟zkiem jest wspiera脛聡 Mo脜聜dawi脛聶 w ochronie uczciwych wybor脙鲁w, w walce z propagand脛聟, w budowie silnych instytucji pa脜聞stwa czy wspieranie rozwoju gospodarczego. Czekamy na uruchomienie pierwszej transzy 脜聸rodk脙鲁w na pobudzenie gospodarki, na infrastruktur脛聶, na unowocze脜聸nienie Mo脜聜dawii. Tylko bezpieczna i suwerenna, silna gospodarczo Mo脜聜dawia mo脜录e by脛聡 gwarantem stabilizacji i bezpiecze脜聞stwa w regionie.

Jako spo脜聜eczno脜聸脛聡 mi脛聶dzynarodowa musimy inicjowa脛聡 i wspiera脛聡 dzia脜聜ania przede wszystkim w obszarze bezpiecze脜聞stwa informacyjnego, cyberobrony, ochrony procesu wyborczego. Kolejnym dzia脜聜aniem musi by脛聡 na脜聜o脜录enie sankcji na rosyjskich oligarch脙鲁w i ich lokalnych agent脙鲁w operuj脛聟cych w Mo脜聜dawii. Trzeba wyra脜潞nie powiedzie脛聡: Rosja nie b脛聶dzie decydowa脛聡 o przysz脜聜o脜聸ci Mo脜聜dawii ani przysz脜聜o脜聸ci Europy.

脗聽脗聽Ivars Ijabs (Renew). 芒聙聯 Mr President, dear colleagues, I want to thank you, Madam Commissioner, for helping Moldova on its way to Ukraine, especially in those fields of fighting hybrid warfare and disinformation, because Moldova belongs to Europe and Moldovan people have clearly demonstrated that.

But this is also about our own strategic considerations: to lose Moldova to Russia would mean a big geopolitical loss for Europe and our own security. Moldova is a key partner in containing Putin's Russia. We have to be serious about that, and we have to draw our lessons from the Georgian experience, where Russia succeeded in organising the anti-European backlash with all the consequences. And right now, approaching elections, we have to do everything to show Moldovans that they are welcome in Europe and we stand with them.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Ioan-Rare脜聼 Bogdan (PPE). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, Excelen脠聸ele Voastre, Kremlinul duce un r脛聝zboi at脙垄t pe frontul din Ucraina, c脙垄t 脠聶i pe cel din Republica Moldova. 脙聨n Ucraina r脛聝pe脠聶te 脠聶i ucide copii, distruge ora脠聶e, 脙庐n Moldova, vrea s脛聝 asasineze speran脠聸a. Campaniile de dezinformare din Moldova seam脛聝n脛聝 ur脛聝 脙庐mpotriva Uniunii Europene, 脙庐nfrico脠聶eaz脛聝 cet脛聝脠聸enii 脠聶i r脛聝sp脙垄ndesc minciuni, toate cu investi脠聸ii f脛聝r脛聝 precedent.

Moldova, cu un pas 脙庐n Eurosistem, este pentru Kremlin un co脠聶mar. El vrea s脛聝 foloseasc脛聝 Moldova 脙庐mpotriva Uniunii, nu s脛聝 o consolideze. De ce? O Uniune cu o funda脠聸ie puternic脛聝, incluz脙垄nd Moldova mai mare 脠聶i mai prosper脛聝, este un partener solid al Americii, adic脛聝 o nuc脛聝 pe care nu o va putea sparge niciodat脛聝. Moscova vrea alia脠聸i s脛聝 distrug脛聝 Europa 脠聶i Statele Unite ale Americii, care cred 脙庐n democra脠聸ie, libertate, pres脛聝 liber脛聝 脠聶i demnitate, nu 脙庐n r脛聝zboi, foamete 脠聶i tiranie - instrumentele Kremlinului.

Suntem aici 脠聶i ne vom ap脛聝ra casa, pentru c脛聝 Europa nu este a mea sau a dumneavoastr脛聝, ci a urma脠聶ilor copiilor no脠聶tri. Suntem 500脗聽de脗聽milioane de europeni 脙庐mpreun脛聝 cu Moldova 脠聶i Ucraina 脠聶i nu ced脛聝m la 脠聶antajul Kremlinului. Fra脠聸ii mei din Basarabia istoric脛聝, azi Republica Moldova, au alegeri parlamentare vitale peste trei s脛聝pt脛聝m脙垄ni. Ei trebuie sprijini脠聸i s脛聝 r脛聝m脙垄n脛聝 pro-Europa 脠聶i 脙庐mpreun脛聝 cu Europa 脠聶i 脙庐n cur脙垄nd integra脠聸i deplin 脙庐n Europa, al脛聝turi de Rom脙垄nia.

脗聽脗聽Andreas Schieder (S&D). 芒聙聯 Herr Pr脙陇sident, sehr geehrte Kolleginnen und Kollegen! Es sind nur mehr knapp zweieinhalb Wochen bis zu dieser richtungsweisenden Wahl in Moldawien am 28.脗聽September, und wir sehen das, was wir auch schon in der Vergangenheit bei Wahlen dort gesehen haben, n脙陇mlich dass die russische Einflussnahme auf diese Wahlen schon jetzt im Vorfeld massiv zunimmt.

Pr脙陇sidentin Maia Sandu hat heute betont, dass das, was in Moldawien passiert, eine ernste Warnung f脙录r ganz Europa sein muss, und sie hat vollkommen recht, denn die moldawische und damit auch die europ脙陇ische Demokratie ist durch diese Einflussnahme von Russland massiv gef脙陇hrdet; es gibt die Beispiele aus der Vergangenheit.

Gleichzeitig zeigt sich auch, dass dieses Beitrittsland ein wichtiges Bollwerk gegen diese russische Aggression ist; daher ist es wichtig, dass wir nicht nur jetzt vor den Wahlen, sondern grunds脙陇tzlich als Europ脙陇ische Union Moldawien aktiv unterst脙录tzen, um die Einflussnahme abzuwehren, um den demokratischen Prozess zu st脙陇rken und die europ脙陇ischen Grundwerte zu sichern.

脗聽脗聽Maciej W脛聟sik (ECR). 芒聙聯 Panie Przewodnicz脛聟cy! 脜禄yczymy Mo脜聜dawii wolnych, demokratycznych wybor脙鲁w. Wspierajmy Mo脜聜dawi脛聶 i woln脛聟 wol脛聶 jej obywateli wyra脜录on脛聟 w wolnych wyborach, wolnych od ingerencji Rosji.

O dzia脜聜aniach Rosji m脙鲁wi脜聜a dzi脜聸 na tej sali pani prezydent Sandu. Ale w wybory demokratyczne potrafi ingerowa脛聡 nie tylko Rosja. W 2023 roku Polska podczas ostatnich wybor脙鲁w parlamentarnych do脜聸wiadczy脜聜a bezprawnego nacisku Komisji Europejskiej. Przecie脜录 to jest bzdura. To jest w脜聜a脜聸nie ten g脜聜os rosyjskich populist脙鲁w, prorosyjskich wszystkich marionetek, kt脙鲁re atakuj脛聟 Uni脛聶 Europejsk脛聟. Bo o co walczy Mo脜聜dawia? Ile tych g脜聜os脙鲁w takich antymo脜聜dawskich, antyeuropejskich mogli脜聸my us脜聜ysze脛聡 na czele z panem, chyba z partii SOS Rumunia, kt脙鲁ry atakowa脜聜 mo脜聜dawskie aspiracje, ale wcze脜聸niej jego partia wielokrotnie opowiada脜聜a si脛聶 za Rosj脛聟, wysuwaj脛聟c nawet 脜录脛聟dania terytorialne wobec Mo脜聜dawii. 脗聽脗聽Victor Negrescu (S&D). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, doamn脛聝 comisar, Consiliul trebuie s脛聝 aprobe de 脙庐ndat脛聝 脙庐nceperea de c脛聝tre Republica Moldova a negocierilor de aderare pe capitole la Uniunea European脛聝. Primul cluster trebuie s脛聝 fie deschis de 脙庐ndat脛聝. Acesta este mesajul puternic de sprijin pe care 脙庐l transmitem ast脛聝zi cet脛聝脠聸enilor din Republica Moldova, de la tribuna Parlamentului European.

脙聨n rezolu脠聸ia pe care o dezbatem ast脛聝zi 脠聶i printre ai c脛聝rei ini脠聸iatori m脛聝 num脛聝r, explic脛聝m clar c脛聝 sus脠聸inerea european脛聝 脙庐nseamn脛聝 securitate, fonduri europene 脠聶i independen脠聸脛聝 energetic脛聝 pentru Republica Moldova. De fapt, un trai mai bun. Alegerile parlamentare din aceast脛聝 toamn脛聝 sunt cruciale pentru ca parcursul european s脛聝 devin脛聝 ireversibil.

脙聨n rezolu脠聸ia noastr脛聝, condamn脛聝m cu fermitate interferen脠聸ele Federa脠聸iei Ruse 脠聶i ne exprim脛聝m sus脠聸inerea total脛聝 pentru organizarea de alegeri libere. De altfel, la ini脠聸iativa mea 脠聶i a Pre脠聶edintei Parlamentului European, 脙庐n parteneriat cu Parlamentul Republicii Moldova, am opera脠聸ionalizat un birou al legislativului european la Chi脠聶in脛聝u, menit s脛聝 sprijine direct eforturile de aderare 脠聶i, de asemenea, s脛聝 combat脛聝 activ dezinformarea. Doar for脠聸ele politice pro-europene pot negocia 脠聶i implementa legisla脠聸ia european脛聝 脠聶i duce astfel la 脙庐ndeplinirea obiectivului ader脛聝rii la Uniunea European脛聝, sper脛聝m, prin finalizarea negocierilor 脙庐n anul 2028.

脗聽脗聽Rasa Juknevi脛聧ien脛聴 (PPE). 芒聙聯 Mr President, dear Moldovan brothers and sisters, we once suffered together under the Soviet Empire 芒聙聯 losing lives, freedom and prosperity, and enduring forced Russification. Today, the absolute majority of Lithuanians are happy to live as a free European state. My country is the best example of what EU membership can give a nation.

The upcoming elections in Moldova are existential. The Kremlin wants to drag you back with lies, saying Europe will ban your religion, force you to change your gender, make you participate in gay Pride parades or involve you in war. None of this is true!

The Kremlin proxies will offer you money for your vote. They will scare you and lie to you. But I assure you: the EU strongly supports your membership.

However, the choice is yours. I trust you will choose freedom, truth and your European future. Good luck, dear friends.

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Thijs Reuten (S&D). 芒聙聯 Mr脗聽President, colleagues, Commissioner, Moldova is Europe, and its upcoming elections are the next frontline in Russia's hybrid war: disinformation, dirty money, cyberattacks and even priests spreading Kremlin propaganda. As was said before, this is not just about Chi脠聶in脛聝u; it's about us. If Russia can break Moldovan democracy, it weakens Europe.

And like with the referendum last year, this is a test of our common resolve. I was there in Chi脠聶in脛聝u, and many in Europe, like myself, were happy with the 50.34脗聽%. Yes! But the real news was that Putin almost succeeded.

The EU must stand shoulder to shoulder with Moldovans who want a European future. I welcome the support that the EU has been providing to Moldova, and we must continue to do what's needed to guarantee free elections 芒聙聯 free from Russian interference.

Democracy is under attack. Let's defend it together!

脗聽
脗聽脗聽
脗聽

脗聽脗聽Sandra Kalniete (PPE). 芒聙聯 God脛聛tais s脛聯des vad脛芦t脛聛j! Kol脛聯脛拢i!脗聽Tas ir lieliski, ka 脜隆odien Eiropas Parlamentu uzrun脛聛ja prezidente Maia Sandu. Vi脜聠a ir politiska un mor脛聛la autorit脛聛te ne tikai mold脛聛viem, bet ar脛芦 visiem eiropie脜隆iem.

Moldovas progress ce脛录脛聛 uz Eiropas integr脛聛ciju ir tik iespaid脛芦gs, ka mums p脛聯c iesp脛聯jas 脛聛tr脛聛k ir j脛聛atver pievieno脜隆an脛聛s sarunas. Moldova kop脛聛 ar Ukrainu pieder Eiropas Savien脛芦bai, un t脛聛m kop脛聛 ir j脛聛virz脛聛s uz priek脜隆u pievieno脜隆an脛聛s proces脛聛.

Gaid脛聛m脛聛s parlamenta v脛聯l脛聯脜隆anas b脜芦s iz脜隆脛路iro脜隆as Moldovai t脛聛s ce脛录脛聛 uz Eiropas Savien脛芦bu. M脛聯s zin脛聛m, cik lielas p脜芦les Kremlis pieliek, lai destabiliz脛聯tu Moldovu un kav脛聯tu t脛聛s progresu ar toksisku dezinform脛聛ciju, kiberuzbrukumiem un miljoniem, p脛聯rkot v脛聯l脛聯t脛聛ju balsis.

Eiropas Savien脛芦bai ir j脛聛pieliek visas p脜芦les, lai nov脛聯rstu Krem脛录a iejauk脜隆anos demokr脛聛tiskajos procesos Moldov脛聛, tostarp stiprinot v脛聯l脛聯脜隆anu infrastrukt脜芦ras dro脜隆脛芦bu un sniedzot atbalstu dezinform脛聛cijas apkaro脜隆an脛聛.

Dro脜隆a, plauksto脜隆a un stabila Moldova ir Eiropas Savien脛芦bas vit脛聛l脛聛s interes脛聯s.

脗聽脗聽Liudas Ma脜戮ylis (PPE). 芒聙聯 Pirmininke, komisare, kolegos. Rugs脛聴jo 28-脛聟j脛聟 Moldova dar kart脛聟 tur脛聴s patvirtinti europin脛聶 krypt脛炉. O Kremlius primeta ar脜隆脜鲁 hibridin脛炉 kar脛聟. Rusai 脛炉sivaizduoja tebegalintys destruktyviai veikti posovietin脛聴j erdv脛聴j ir tam negaili 脛炉prastini脜鲁 ir sumodernint脜鲁 priemoni脜鲁. Tai 芒聙聯 kriptovaliut脜鲁 kanalais finansuojami neva protestai, bals脜鲁 pirkimas 脜隆e脜隆脛聴liniais milijonais, 脜戮aidimas separatist脜鲁 korta, brukama neva 芒聙聻balanso tarp Ryt脜鲁 ir Europos芒聙聹 id脛聴ja, paremiama 脛炉steigt脜鲁 neva 芒聙聻vidurio芒聙聹 partij脜鲁 greta atvirai promaskvieti脜隆k脜鲁. O Moldovos pilietin脛聴 visuomen脛聴 privalo atsilaikyti 芒聙聯 atmesti praeities 脜隆m脛聴klas ir palaikyti ne tik savo pa脛聧i脜鲁 demokratij脛聟 ir klest脛聴jim脛聟, regiono stabilum脛聟, bet ir visos Europos atsparum脛聟. O geriausia, k脛聟 galime padaryti mes 芒聙聯 neu脜戮delsiant konkretizuoti Moldovos naryst脛聴s Europos S脛聟jungoje proces脛聟.

脗聽脗聽Juan Fernando L脙鲁pez Aguilar (S&D). 芒聙聯 Se脙卤or presidente, cuando debatimos aqu脙颅 sobre las amenazas h脙颅bridas y las intereferencias que se ciernen sobre las inminentes elecciones en Moldavia estamos llamando al elefante en la habitaci脙鲁n por su nombre: la Rusia de Putin, que mantiene presencia militar en Transnistria (secesionista de Moldavia) y que adem脙隆s ha dicho con claridad que cualquier extensi脙鲁n de la Uni脙鲁n Europea hacia el este 芒聙聰no ya digamos de la OTAN芒聙聰 no solamente no contribuir脙隆 a la seguridad del continente sino que, por el contrario, ampliar脙隆 los objetivos militares en lo que reivindica como su zona de influencia. Por tanto, para apoyar la progresi脙鲁n de Moldavia hacia la Uni脙鲁n Europea no basta con aplaudir a su presidenta como hemos hecho esta ma脙卤ana, ni con resoluciones y buenas palabras. Hace falta, adem脙隆s, una voluntad pol脙颅tica y una unidad de acci脙鲁n exterior que en esta legislatura se ha debilitado gravemente con respecto de la promesa de la autonom脙颅a estrat脙漏gica. Y eso significa que, cuando hemos aprobado extender el mandato de la Comisi脙鲁n Especial sobre el Escudo Europeo de la Democracia, lo que hay que hacer es deducir las lecciones para que la Comisi脙鲁n adopte iniciativas concretas, que demuestre que no bastan las palabras y las buenas intenciones ni el poder blando para defender la idea europea de democracia.

脗聽脗聽Vytenis Povilas Andriukaitis (S&D). 芒聙聯 Gerbiamas pos脛聴d脜戮io pirmininke, gerbiama komisare, gerbiami kolegos. 脜聽iandien Moldovos prezident脛聴s Maios Sandu kalba 脛聧ia, Europos Parlamente, buvo paremta faktais, skai脛聧iais ir neatremiamais argumentais. Putino re脜戮imo pastangos paveikti Moldovos rinkim脜鲁 脛炉 parlament脛聟 rugs脛聴jo 28 d. rezultatus ir u脜戮valdyti Moldov脛聟 per balsad脛聴脜戮es, pa脛聧iu grubiausiu b脜芦du pa脜戮eid脜戮iant tarptautin脛聶 teis脛聶, 芒聙聯 tai mums, pasisakantiems 脜隆iandien u脜戮 Moldovos keli脛聟 脛炉 Europos S脛聟jung脛聟, u脜戮 teis脛聴s vir脜隆enyb脛聶 teisin脛聴je valstyb脛聴je, yra visi脜隆kai akivaizdu. 脗聽脗聽Thierry Mariani (PfE). 芒聙聯 Monsieur le Pr脙漏sident, toutes les ing脙漏rences en Moldavie sont intol脙漏rables, toutes, comme celle qui consiste, dix jours avant la pr脙漏sidentielle moldave, quand Mme脗聽von脗聽der脗聽Leyen se rend 脙聽 Kichinev, 脙聽 promettre 1,8脗聽milliard d'euros. De m脙陋me, en ce mois d'ao脙禄t, le pr脙漏sident Macron, le chancelier allemand et Donald脗聽Tusk se sont rendus en Moldavie pour soutenir Maia脗聽Sandu et peser sur les l脙漏gislatives de septembre prochain. Dans les deux cas, le message est clair: votez Sandu et vous aurez l'argent de l'Europe.

Toutes les manipulations sont intol脙漏rables. Que dire quand un r脙漏f脙漏rendum est gagn脙漏 d'extr脙陋me justesse gr脙垄ce au vote de la diaspora moldave 脙聽 l'脙漏tranger, et que cette diaspora moldave en Russie n'a pas pu voter, o脙鹿 r脙漏sident pourtant 500脗聽000脗聽Moldaves?

Toute la justice doit 脙陋tre 脙漏quitable. Que dire quand un gouverneur, celui de la Gagaouzie, prend sept ans de prison, tout simplement pour 脙陋tre d'un parti qui n'est plus accept脙漏 en Moldavie?

脗聽脗聽Diana Iovanovici 脜聻o脜聼oac脛聝 (NI). 芒聙聯 Domnule pre脠聶edinte, am v脛聝zut c脛聝 v-a deranjat pe cei mai mul脠聸i dintre dumneavoastr脛聝 c脛聝 am spus 芒聙聻Moldova este Rom脙垄nia芒聙聺, dar 脠聶i acuza脠聸i - putinism 脠聶i a脠聶a mai departe. Se vede c脛聝 sunte脠聸i tabula rasa 脙庐n istorie. Habar nu ave脠聸i de istorie! Moldova se numea Basarabia 脠聶i Basarabia e Rom脙垄nia.

脠聵ti脠聸i cine este 脙庐mpotriva istoriei adev脛聝rate 脠聶i spune c脛聝 Moldova nu a fost niciodat脛聝 a Rom脙垄niei 脠聶i nu trebuie s脛聝 ne unim 脠聶i c脛聝 nu avem drepturi asupra Moldovei? Rusia lui Putin 脠聶i Putin.

Ave脠聸i aceea脠聶i retoric脛聝 ca 脠聶i Putin 脠聶i ca 脠聶i Federa脠聸ia Rus脛聝 脙庐n privin脠聸a unirii Rom脙垄niei cu Moldova. Vorbi脠聸i de democra脠聸ie 脙庐n Moldova, 脙庐n Basarabia noastr脛聝? Interdic脠聸ia partidelor opozante 脠聶i a candida脠聸ilor - asta face Maia Sandu - alegeri fraudate cu ajutorul puterii de la Bucure脠聶ti, instituirea terorii 脙庐mpotriva opozan脠聸ilor 脠聶i aruncarea lor 脙庐n pu脠聶c脛聝rie,脗聽脙庐nchiderea televiziunilor care nu sus脠聸in linia Maiei Sandu, 脙庐nchiderea 脠聶i cenzurarea ziarelor, at脙垄t cele care se v脙垄nd la tarabe, c脙垄t 脠聶i cele din online, cenzurarea social media, 脙庐nchiderea conturilor organiza脠聸iilor care sunt opozante. Moldova este un stat artificial, Basarabia e (...)

(脙聨ncheierea interven脠聸iilor la cerere)
